g.text: hero, CTAs, mission text, artist profiles
Add new editable content without schema changes:
2. Add reactive() object in admin page
3. Upsert on save / select on load
4. Read with fallback defaults in public page
jsonb value shape is defined by the app, not the schema.
No ALTER TABLE, no migrations, no new routes.
Gallery images, merch photos, admin uploads

Returns public CDN URLs after upload
referenced by image_url columns across all tables

No API key required for tiles
Default hero image pool for regions
Stack: Vue 3 + Quasar 2 (Vite) · Supabase PostgreSQL · Leaflet.js · archive.org · Stripe · Vercel
All tables use UUID primary keys · timestamptz for all datetimes · RLS enabled on all tables · anon key safe for client
